name: SpiderFoot
description: SpiderFoot is an open-source OSINT automation tool that integrates with over 200 data sources to perform reconnaissance, attack surface mapping, and threat intelligence gathering. SpiderFoot HX provides a cloud-hosted version with a full REST API.

actions.name: Start Scan
actions.description: Initiate a new SpiderFoot OSINT scan against a specified target (IP, domain, email, hostname, or other entity type).

parameters.name: scantarget
parameters.description: The target to scan (IP address, domain, email, hostname, etc.)

parameters.name: modules
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of specific modules to use

actions.name: List Scans
actions.description: Get a list of all scans that exist in the SpiderFoot instance, including their status, target, and timestamps.

actions.name: Get Scan Status
actions.description: Check the current status of a specific scan including target, name, start time, end time, and completion state.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The scan ID to check status for

actions.name: Get Scan Summary
actions.description: Return a summary of results for a completed scan including counts of each data element type discovered.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The scan ID to get summary for

actions.name: Get Scan Results
actions.description: Retrieve all results from a completed scan, optionally filtered by data element type or source module.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The scan ID to retrieve results for
